summary: ISS-1069 was previously merged into EXP-168 (tracker status: merged_into_EXP-168). EXP-168 is complete and contains the representative M ≈ µ₀·N₁N₂A₁A₂/(4πd³) calculation with V_induced derivation requested here. Recommend closing ISS-1069 alongside ISS-1068 in the same decider integration commit.
